text: vv. 19-22: Lk. 9.57. v. 22: Some think that the father was still alive, and the son wanted to defer his following of Christ until his father’s death. Our Lord’s answer is perhaps simply meant to imply that true life can only be found in following him.
vv. 23-34: Mk. 4.35; Lk. 8.22. Only St Matthew mentions the second demoniac, who may have been a woman.
